headline: LG 7.1.3-Ch S90TR Dolby Atmos Soundbar — members save $433 (36% off), SKU 6577957. By far the biggest single member discount in the store today and the easiest big-ticket membership close.
objection: If they hesitate on membership: “Plus is $29.99 for the year — on this LG S90TR soundbar alone you save $433 today, so the membership pays for itself more than 14 times over before it even leaves the store.”

financing.note: All promotional financing below requires the My Best Buy Credit Card and is DEFERRED-INTEREST special financing — pitch as “no interest IF paid in full by the end of the term,” never “no interest” flat (interest backdates to the purchase date if the balance isn't cleared in time). Category terms were re-verified today from the 'suggested payments with __-Month Financing' callout on live bestbuy.com product pages. Exact minimum-spend rungs and current card-reward multipliers could NOT be verified on bestbuy.com this run (the credit-card hub redirected / returned Page Not Found) — confirm those in-store/app before quoting.

cardOffers: Card-linked reward multipliers and limited-time bonuses could not be verified on bestbuy.com this run — confirm current offers in-store/app before quoting specifics.
Site-wide banner confirmed live today: 'Appreciation Event — Ends Sunday' (7/19/26) with limited quantities / no rainchecks — a member-facing event, verify card-bonus details in-store/app.
financing.pitch: Lead every big-ticket demo with the monthly payment: the $2,499.99 Hisense 85" is ~$69/mo over 36 months, the GE Profile dryer ~$58/mo over 18. Turn the big demo into a card app, and confirm exact reward multipliers in-store since they weren't verifiable online today.

memberPerks.note: My Best Buy Plus is $29.99/yr; My Best Buy Total is $199.99/yr (never quote $49.99). Members unlock member-only prices (every deal on this dashboard), plus extended 60-day returns and free 2-day shipping; Total adds Geek Squad 24/7 support and product protection.
limitedTime: 🚩 Appreciation Event — Ends Sunday 7/19/26 (site-wide banner verified live today): member-only prices, limited quantities, no rainchecks. Best reason to sign someone up TODAY.
Specific bonus-reward multipliers were not verifiable on bestbuy.com this run — confirm in-store/app before quoting.
memberPerks.pitch: Lead with the Appreciation Event — it ends Sunday and it's the reason to join now. Then anchor on the biggest verified save in front of the customer (the LG S90TR at $433 off pays for a Plus membership 14x over).
